NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR OCT-10-2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-05-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS ALVIN PARKER AND MARY PARKER'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-16-556138 AND CGC-16-555160 IS GRANTED PER THE STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. THE CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. CGC-16-555160 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE NUMBER. THE PARTIES SHALL APPLY TO DEPARTMENT 206 FOR A NEW TRIAL DATE, IF NECESSARY. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE: ANGELA BRADSTREET; CLERK: J. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Continued To Feb-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-556138 WITH CASE CGC-16-555160
Off Calendar Aug-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher J. Capalbo of the law offices of Siegel Moreno & Stettler (619-525-7626) appears especially, by telephone, as counsel for Pacific Compensation Insurance Co., plaintiff in related case CGC-16-556138

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFFS ALVIN PARKER and MARY PARKER's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-16-556138 and CGC-16-555160 is GRANTED per the stipulation of the parties. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-16-555160 is designated the lead case number. The parties shall apply to department 206 for a new trial date, if necessary.

The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR No. 12353, email: mviscio@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
